description_long: This object is a highly stylized, abstract representation of a pedestrian adult, constructed from thin, elongated rods and angular shapes. The figure is composed of a minimalistic frame, with long, straight limbs and a sharply angled torso, giving it a geometric and almost skeletal appearance. The head is suggested by a small, angular form at the top of the structure, while the arms and legs are represented by straight, narrow rods. The overall posture suggests a walking or striding motion, with one leg extended forward and the other back. The construction appears metallic, with a smooth, hard surface and a slight sheen, indicating a possible steel or aluminum material. The design is modern and artistic, likely intended as a public art installation or a conceptual figure in an urban environment.
description: A minimalistic, abstract metallic figure of a walking adult, composed of thin rods and angular shapes, evoking a modern, geometric style.
description_view_0: The front view shows the angular torso and the extended limbs, with the head form visible at the top and the stride clearly defined.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the length of the limbs and the forward stride, with the thinness of the rods and the angular construction most apparent.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the torso and the alignment of the legs, with the geometric structure of the figure's frame visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the stride and the elongated limbs, with the angular torso and head form visible from a different angle.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted form with no discernible clothing, stylized to suggest a human figure
attribute_posture: walking stride with one leg forward and one back
attribute_footwear_type: not discernible due to abstract form
attribute_hairstyle: not discernible due to abstract form
